title: Cottsia gracilis

intro: Cottsia gracilis, also known as "Punarnava", is a plant species belonging to the family Amaranthaceae, traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine. The health benefits of Cottsia gracilis include its ability to improve kidney function, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms associated with diabetes and cardiovascular diseases. The bioactive constituents of Cottsia gracilis include punarnavine, which has been shown to exhibit antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, as well as other compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids.
